heading: What we actually check before recommending a resort

cards.title: Lagoon safety
cards.text: Some house reefs drop off sharply just past the shoreline — not ideal with toddlers. We check depth and current before recommending.

cards.title: Kids' club age range
cards.text: Clubs typically run 2–12 or 4–12 — the exact range varies a lot by resort. We confirm it covers your children's ages before booking.

cards.title: Room configuration
cards.text: Connecting rooms, family beach villas, or a villa with a second bedroom — not every resort offers all of these.

cards.title: Meal plan fit
cards.text: All-inclusive is usually easiest with kids — fewer surprise costs on drinks, snacks, and kids' menus.
